name: Ethereum
rationale: ETH has the cleanest near-term setup in the watchlist: the state feed shows +4.28% 1W and +19.16% 1M momentum, while BTC is weaker and the rest of the universe is less aligned with the long-only trend filter. The catalyst is also better for ETH: recent coverage says ether outran bitcoin as ETF money returned, with Robinhood Chain using ether for gas and processing more than $800 million a day, and
